reviews.review_msg: Very very good lecturer. Class content is interesting and well thought out. In-class assignments works well to motivate students to do the readings. Good variety of contributors to your overall grade (art gallery visit, in-class work, assignments, essays, participation). I learnt a lot and would definitely take a course with this professor again!

Took this a couple sems ago. But she is awesome! Very knowledgable and actually wants her students to understand material. She MAKES SURE yall understand. I love it. Tests were reasonable and lectures feel like you're having an insightful conversation. No laptops allowed, only paper. Improved my memory retention by a MILE.

An absolute dream of a professor. Lectures are engaging, Dr. King explains things super clearly and makes sure that everyone understands the content. She is encouraging during discussions and is open to hearing student perspectives and is super patient. She is a fair grader and is always willing to help in office hours. One of the best profs ever.

(ethical issues in art): one of the best professors i've ever had. dr. king is a fantastic lecturer and is super helpful to speak with regarding assignments. she gives great feedback and seems to be a fair marker. she is very understanding and responds to emails quickly. overall, a fantastic professor and a great class, can't recommend enough.

Professor King is great. The assigned readings, while a lot, build on one another very nicely and her lectures complemented them nicely. She is very understanding and her marking is as fair as you can get. Only critique is that some questions in the weekly assignments seemed to be a bit vague but since she marks so fairly, this was a nonissue.
